description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a bold red and black color scheme. The front panel includes a large rectangular screen, a control panel with a joystick and two buttons, and a coin slot below. The marquee at the top displays the title 'Werewolf Warehouse' in stylized text, framed by red accents. Both side panels are adorned with striking graphics of a red, snarling werewolf head, outlined with jagged lines for dramatic effect. The back of the cabinet is plain black with two vent panels and a lower access panel. The overall construction appears to be primarily wood or MDF with plastic and metal components for controls and trim.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with red and black colors, werewolf-themed side art, a marquee, and a control panel with joystick and buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, marquee, control panel with joystick and buttons, and coin slot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large red werewolf graphic and the cabinet's angular profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black back with two vent panels and a lower access panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same werewolf artwork and cabinet shape.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat rectangular, medium size with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two round buttons, spaced apart, with a simple black and red color scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'Werewolf Warehouse' in bold white and red letters, with a red background and werewolf-themed graphics.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display a large, stylized red werewolf head with jagged outlines on a black background, creating a dramatic and thematic visual effect.
